# Fremanezumab 相關新聞

[← 返回新聞總覽]({{ '/news/' | relative_url }})

---

<p class="key-answer" data-question="Fremanezumab 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Fremanezumab</strong> 目前有 <strong>3 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 20 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Fremanezumab 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Ajovy is indicated for prophylaxis of migraine in adults who have at least 4&nbsp;migraine days per month.</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>migraine with brainstem aura（99.9%）</li>
<li>migraine disorder（99.9%）</li>
<li>migraine with or without aura, susceptibility to（99.3%）</li>
<li>atrophoderma vermiculata（99.0%）</li>
<li>ulerythema ophryogenesis（98.6%）</li>
<li>heparin cofactor 2 deficiency（96.9%）</li>
<li>antithrombin deficiency type 2（96.4%）</li>
<li>factor 5 excess with spontaneous thrombosis（96.2%）</li>
<li>thrombophilia（94.3%）</li>
<li>amenorrhea (disease)（92.7%）</li>
<li>sciatic neuropathy（90.3%）</li>
<li>hemorrhagic disease of newborn（80.8%）</li>
<li>severe nonproliferative diabetic retinopathy（66.0%）</li>
<li>hyperemesis gravidarum (disease)（64.2%）</li>
<li>hyperparathyroidism, primary, caused by water clear cell hyperplasia（60.2%）</li>
<li>omphalocele (disease)（59.8%）</li>
<li>sudden arrhythmia death syndrome（59.3%）</li>
<li>cauda equina syndrome（59.0%）</li>
<li>prekallikrein deficiency（58.9%）</li>
<li>Coronavinae infectious disease（58.8%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
<p><a href="{{ '/drugs/fremanezumab/' | relative_url }}">查看完整藥物報告 →</a></p>
</div>
